error_signature: credential fields start to flash and disappear
title: SMTP credential fields not displaying correctly
symptom: When attempting to register SMTP credentials, the fields flash and then disappear, preventing input. This issue occurs despite previously functioning correctly.
not_this_if: Fields are visible in other credential configurations
Issue does not occur in other n8n versions
root_cause: The presence of the `N8N_DEFAULT_LOCALE` environment variable can interfere with the rendering of credential fields in the n8n interface, causing them to behave unexpectedly.
fix_steps: Access your n8n Docker environment configuration
Restart the n8n service to apply changes
agent_instruction: Remove the `N8N_DEFAULT_LOCALE` variable from your Docker configuration and restart n8n.
